summary: Iteration 178: Inviter Modal System Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: admin users do NOT see inviter modal, member detail dialog shows 'Inviter' field in read-only view, edit mode provides inviter lookup/search functionality with name/email/merin_code display.
test_credentials: Master Admin: iam@ryansalvador.com / admin123, Test member: J J (id=streaks-referral), Test inviter: Ryan Salvador TEST (id=streaks-referral)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inviter Modal system fully working: 1) POST /api/referrals/set-inviter accepts inviter_id, links user, returns success with inviter_name. 2) Self-referral rejected with 400. 3) Already-set inviter rejected with 400. 4) Login response includes referred_by field. 5) PUT /api/admin/members/{id} with referred_by_user_id allows admin to set/change/clear inviter. 6) InviterModal (data-testid='inviter-modal') does NOT appear for admin users (master_admin, super_admin, basic_admin). 7) Admin Members page: view mode shows 'Inviter' field (data-testid='member-inviter-display'), edit mode shows 'Inviter (Who Referred Them)' with search input (data-testid='admin-inviter-search'), results dropdown (data-testid='admin-inviter-results'), and individual options (data-testid='admin-inviter-option-{id}'). 8) Clear inviter button: data-testid='clear-inviter-btn'. 9) Search results show name, masked_email, and merin_code.

lookup_members_works.notes: Returns members with id, name, masked_email, merin_code

frontend_member_view_inviter_field.notes: 'Inviter' label and 'Not set' value shown in profile tab

frontend_inviter_search_results.notes: Search 'Ryan' shows dropdown with Ryan Salvador TEST

frontend_inviter_selection.notes: Selecting result shows inviter name with Clear button

verified_features.set_inviter_endpoint: WORKING - POST /api/referrals/set-inviter accepts inviter_id, returns inviter_name
verified_features.self_referral_prevention: WORKING - Returns 400 when inviter_id == current user
verified_features.already_set_prevention: WORKING - Returns 400 when referred_by already set
verified_features.login_referred_by: WORKING - Login response includes referred_by field
verified_features.inviter_modal_exclusion_for_admins: WORKING - Modal NOT shown for master_admin/super_admin/basic_admin
verified_features.admin_member_view_inviter: WORKING - 'Inviter' field shown in read-only profile view
verified_features.admin_member_edit_inviter_lookup: WORKING - Search input with results dropdown in edit mode
